visualization.requirement: Customer Segmentation Dashboard: Grouped bar charts showing order count and average order value per segment with error bars for standard deviation
visualization.reason: Replaces box plots with interaction-compatible encoding while maintaining distribution visibility

visualization.requirement: Basket Composition View: Stacked bar charts showing product category distribution per customer segment with payment method facet columns
visualization.reason: Parallel categories not supported; stacked bars enable multi-dimensional analysis with allowed chart types

interaction.requirement: Click-to-filter on heatmap cells showing SKU-level co-occurrence in separate linked view (instead of expansion)
interaction.reason: Avoids overplotting in primary view while maintaining category-level readability
